prompt: sync the coding-standards skill from ECC — check if it has any new cross-references in the latest upstream version that we need to pick

assertions.text: Runs pnpm sync or git diff to see what changed in upstream
assertions.check: Response mentions pnpm sync skills/coding-standards or equivalent diff command

assertions.text: Explicitly applies cross-reference scan to the diff output (not just generic upgrade)
assertions.check: Response mentions scanning the diff for new skill/agent/hook references added since last import

assertions.text: Describes what action to take if new cross-references ARE found in the diff
assertions.check: Response explains that newly found cross-references would trigger a vendor of that dependency

assertions.text: Describes what action to take if NO new cross-references are found
assertions.check: Response explains that if no new refs found, existing sidecar.dependencies is confirmed accurate
